title_en: Alumni · MS in Biomedical Engineering · University of Shanghai for Science and Technology
title_cn: 校友 · 生物医学工程硕士 · 上海理工大学
bio_en: Alumni of AI4Rad Lab. Received a Master's degree in Biomedical Engineering from the University of Shanghai for Science and Technology in 2023. Worked on medical imaging AI and CT report analysis during her time in the lab.
bio_cn: AI4Rad Lab 校友。2023 年于上海理工大学获生物医学工程硕士学位。在实验室期间从事医学影像人工智能与 CT 报告分析相关研究。
interests_en: CT report analysis with large language models
interests_cn: 基于大语言模型的 CT 报告分析
